regime_note: MONDAY 2026-04-20 22:00 IST. ESCALATION_CONFIRMED with expanded escalation: Iran struck US military communications infrastructure in Mideast; Iran launched retaliatory strikes across region; US death toll 6; Trump says campaign could last 5 WEEKS; US-Israel bomb Iran 4th day air defenses gone; CNN: US military prepped strike this weekend. 15 news_flash events this tick — all us_iran_military reinforcing active-war posture. No new PRICE trigger fired (no level_alerts hit, no bar_close). Positions flat. Thesis unchanged: gold bid / oil bid / USDJPY lower on break / AUDUSD sell on breakdown / USDCAD sell on bounce. Watchlist = 7 alerts all KEEP. Queries = 5 KEEP, news daemon working (us_iran_military query firing as designed). Waiting for price: USDJPY ~158.65 still 15p from 158.50 break; GOLD 4797 in zone but confluence neutral; WTI ~87.3 sub-$90 trigger. No entries without 7-gate pass.

AUDUSD long thesis strengthening from Conv 4 → potentially 5 on entry. But missing formal Iran signature keeps tail risk live. Discipline: no chasing, wait for clean level touch + confirmation.
